indications.text: ARAVA is indicated for the treatment of adults with active rheumatoid arthritis (RA).
ARAVA is indicated for the treatment of adults with active rheumatoid arthritis (RA).

ARAVA is indicated in adults for the treatment of active rheumatoid arthritis (RA):
12
Reference ID: 3211886
This label may not be the latest approved by FDA.

1. to reduce signs and symptoms
2. to inhibit structural damage...

ARAVA is indicated in adults for the treatment of active rheumatoid arthritis (RA):
1. to reduce signs and symptoms
2. to inhibit structural damage as evidenced by X-ray erosions and joint space narrowing
3. to improve physical function.
(see CLINICAL STUDIES)
